Login Issue – Unable to Access Waiver Pro Portal

text.text: Track and manage your support tickets.

While submitting a completed waiver application, the system displays an error message and prevents submission. All required fields appear to be filled. The issue occurs consistently when clicking the Submit Application button. User requests investigation into potential system or validation errors.

User from CDPH is unable to log into the Waiver Pro portal. After entering valid credentials, the system either refreshes the login page or shows an authentication error. The issue started today and persists across different browsers (Chrome and Edge). User requests assistance in verifying account status and resetting access if necessary.
